description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a clean, rectangular design. The exterior features a mix of white and gray walls, complemented by extensive wooden decking that wraps around the house and leads to a swimming pool area. Several mature trees are integrated into the landscape, providing shade and a natural aesthetic. The property includes a detached garage, a driveway, and a fenced backyard with poolside lounge chairs and surfboards. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal overhang, while the rear of the house opens up to the pool and outdoor living spaces. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, wooden decks, a pool, and integrated landscaping. The design is sleek and open, blending indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, detached garage, and extensive wooden decking with mature trees.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the backyard, pool area, fenced section, and the garage in the background.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, poolside lounge area, surfboards, and large glass windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the driveway, garage, main entryway, and a car parked in front.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with minimal overhang, no porch, and direct access from the driveway
